nasb.text: The judges shall investigate thoroughly, and if the witness is a false witness and he has accused his brother falsely,

esv.text: The judges shall inquire diligently, and if the witness is a false witness and has accused his brother falsely,

cnv.text: 審判官要仔細查問；如果見證人是個假證人，作假見證陷害自己的兄弟，

ccb.text: 审判官要仔细审查案件，如果发现那人作伪证，
